---
title: "Live Ops Dashboard"
author: "배진후"
lang: ko
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    scrolling: true
    nav-buttons:
      - text: Portfolio
        href: ../index.html
      - text: DevOps
        href: DevOpsPortfolio.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
.ops-kicker {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.ops-value {
  color: #172033;
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 3vw, 2.45rem);
  font-weight: 720;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.ops-subtle {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}

.ops-status {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.7rem;
  background: #f5f7fb;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
}

.ops-dot {
  width: 0.58rem;
  height: 0.58rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #a16207;
}

.ops-dot.ok {
  background: #16815b;
}

.ops-dot.fail {
  background: #c2413d;
}

.ops-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.ops-hop,
.ops-node,
.ops-endpoint-button {
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
}

.ops-hop {
  padding: 0.75rem;
}

.ops-hop strong {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.ops-node,
.ops-diagram-node,
.ops-mini-card {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 5.4rem;
  padding: 0.8rem;
  color: #172033;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease;
}

.ops-node:hover,
.ops-node:focus,
.ops-diagram-node:hover,
.ops-diagram-node:focus,
.ops-mini-card:hover,
.ops-mini-card:focus {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.14);
  outline: none;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.ops-node.active,
.ops-diagram-node.active,
.ops-mini-card.active {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18);
}

.ops-node.edge {
  border-left: 5px solid #a16207;
}

.ops-node.k8s {
  border-left: 5px solid #16815b;
}

.ops-node.proxmox {
  border-left: 5px solid #2563eb;
}

.ops-node.storage {
  border-left: 5px solid #7c3aed;
}

.ops-node strong,
.ops-endpoint-button strong {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.24rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.ops-node code,
.ops-endpoint-button code {
  color: #5d667a;
  background: #f5f7fb;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  white-space: normal;
}

.ops-node-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  margin-top: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-architecture {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(14rem, 1fr) minmax(16rem, 1.1fr) minmax(18rem, 1.25fr) minmax(24rem, 1.65fr);
  grid-template-rows: auto auto auto;
  gap: 0.78rem;
  min-width: 1100px;
  padding: 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.035) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.035) 1px, transparent 1px),
    #fbfcff;
  background-size: 32px 32px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.ops-architecture-scroll {
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding-bottom: 0.2rem;
}

.ops-flow-lines {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.ops-plane {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  border: 1.5px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  padding: 0.8rem;
}

.ops-plane.edge-plane {
  grid-column: 2 / 4;
  grid-row: 1;
  border-color: #d98b21;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fffaf0, #ffffff);
}

.ops-plane.k8s-plane {
  grid-column: 2 / 4;
  grid-row: 2;
  border-color: #6aa84f;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f6fff4, #ffffff);
}

.ops-plane.api-plane {
  grid-column: 3;
  grid-row: 2;
  align-self: center;
  border-color: #2563eb;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f4f8ff, #ffffff);
  margin: 1.2rem 0;
}

.ops-plane.proxmox-plane {
  grid-column: 4;
  grid-row: 1 / 3;
  border-color: #c47b50;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8f4, #ffffff);
}

.ops-plane.management-plane {
  grid-column: 1 / 2;
  grid-row: 3;
  border-color: #8b5cf6;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #faf7ff, #ffffff);
}

.ops-plane.storage-plane {
  grid-column: 2 / 3;
  grid-row: 3;
  border-color: #8b5cf6;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fbf8ff, #ffffff);
}

.ops-plane.gitops-plane {
  grid-column: 3 / 5;
  grid-row: 3;
  border-color: #8b5cf6;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fbf8ff, #ffffff);
}

.ops-plane-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.52rem;
  color: #7c3f10;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-align: center;
}

.k8s-plane .ops-plane-title {
  color: #246b1f;
}

.api-plane .ops-plane-title {
  color: #1d4ed8;
}

.management-plane .ops-plane-title,
.storage-plane .ops-plane-title,
.gitops-plane .ops-plane-title {
  color: #6d3fad;
}

.ops-diagram-node,
.ops-mini-card {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  display: block;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  appearance: none;
  font: inherit;
}

.ops-diagram-node {
  min-height: 5.2rem;
}

.ops-mini-card {
  min-height: auto;
  padding: 0.58rem 0.64rem;
}

.ops-icon-node {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  align-content: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  min-height: 6.4rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.ops-icon {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 2.6rem;
  height: 2.6rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #eaf1ff;
  color: #1d4ed8;
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.ops-icon.green {
  background: #e8f6ef;
  color: #166044;
}

.ops-icon.orange {
  background: #fff3df;
  color: #9a4e08;
}

.ops-icon.purple {
  background: #f1e9ff;
  color: #6d3fad;
}

.ops-entry {
  grid-column: 1;
  grid-row: 1 / 3;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  align-content: center;
}

.ops-edge-content {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(12rem, 0.9fr) minmax(14rem, 1fr);
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.ops-edge-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  align-content: center;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.ops-k8s-content {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(10rem, 0.7fr) minmax(10rem, 0.7fr) minmax(16rem, 1fr);
  gap: 0.62rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.ops-ingress-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(8.8rem, 1fr));
  gap: 0.52rem;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
}

.ops-api-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.38rem;
  margin-top: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-api-list div {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
}

.ops-vm-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.48rem;
}

.ops-vm-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 3.2rem minmax(7rem, 1fr) minmax(7rem, 1fr) 2.6rem;
  gap: 0.52rem;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: auto;
  padding: 0.48rem 0.56rem;
}

.ops-vm-badge {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 2.6rem;
  height: 2rem;
  border-radius: 5px;
  background: #1f5fbf;
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.ops-vm-badge.green {
  background: #2f7d32;
}

.ops-vm-badge.purple {
  background: #7c3fad;
}

.ops-node-name {
  font-weight: 750;
}

.ops-node-address {
  color: #1d4ed8;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.ops-node-address.green {
  color: #2f7d32;
}

.ops-node-address.purple {
  color: #6d3fad;
}

.ops-bottom-path {
  display: grid;
  grid-auto-flow: column;
  grid-auto-columns: minmax(6.8rem, 1fr);
  gap: 0.45rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.ops-path-item {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  min-height: 4.6rem;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-path-item strong {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
}

.ops-endpoint-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.6rem;
}

.ops-endpoint-button {
  min-height: 5.1rem;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  color: #172033;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.ops-endpoint-button:hover,
.ops-endpoint-button:focus {
  border-color: #16815b;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(22, 129, 91, 0.14);
  outline: none;
}

.ops-response-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.ops-response-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-action-button {
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #172033;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.68rem;
}

.ops-action-button:hover,
.ops-action-button:focus {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  outline: none;
}

.ops-code {
  max-height: 27rem;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #101827;
  color: #e6edf7;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
  padding: 0.8rem;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.ops-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.ops-table th,
.ops-table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e6e9f0;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.5rem;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.ops-table th {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.ops-table .sr-only {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: 0;
}

.ops-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.12rem 0.45rem;
  background: #f5f7fb;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.ops-pill.running,
.ops-pill.online,
.ops-pill.up {
  background: #e8f6ef;
  color: #166044;
}

.ops-pill.stopped,
.ops-pill.down,
.ops-pill.fail,
.ops-pill.error {
  background: #faecea;
  color: #9b2f2b;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .ops-architecture {
    min-width: 940px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  .ops-response-header {
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .ops-response-actions {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

.ops-mgmt-node-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.52rem;
}

.ops-mgmt-tools {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.38rem;
}

.ops-mgmt-tool-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 2rem 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.55rem;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 7px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #172033;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease;
}

.ops-mgmt-tool-row:hover,
.ops-mgmt-tool-row:focus {
  border-color: #7c3fad;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124, 63, 173, 0.12);
  outline: none;
}

.ops-mgmt-tool-row.active {
  border-color: #7c3fad;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124, 63, 173, 0.16);
}

.ops-mgmt-tool-icon {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 2rem;
  height: 1.6rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.ops-mgmt-tool-label {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
}

.ops-legend {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.9rem 1.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid #e6e9f0;
  border-radius: 7px;
  background: #fafbfd;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #5d667a;
}

.ops-legend-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-legend-line {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 2rem;
  height: 2px;
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.ops-legend-line.green { background: #2f7d32; }
.ops-legend-line.blue { background: #2563eb; }
.ops-legend-line.purple { background: #7c3fad; }
.ops-legend-line.dashed {
  background: none;
  border-top: 2px dashed currentColor;
  height: 0;
  margin-top: 1px;
}
.ops-legend-line.purple.dashed { border-color: #7c3fad; }
.ops-legend-line.blue.dashed { border-color: #2563eb; }
</style>
```

## Row {height="18%"}

::: {.valuebox icon="activity" color="success"}
Prometheus Targets

<div class="ops-value" id="targets-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="targets-detail">ops-api.mintcocoa.cc 연결 중</div>
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="hdd-network" color="primary"}
Kubernetes Pods

<div class="ops-value" id="pods-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="pods-detail">Prometheus kube-state-metrics</div>
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="server" color="info"}
Proxmox Node

<div class="ops-value" id="node-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="node-detail">172.30.1.12 API token auth</div>
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="pc-display" color="warning"}
Virtual Machines

<div class="ops-value" id="vm-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="vm-detail">running / total</div>
:::

## Row {height="45%"}

::: {.card title="Interactive Homelab Flow"}
```{=html}
<div class="ops-architecture-scroll">
<div class="ops-architecture" aria-label="Homelab architecture API map">
  <svg class="ops-flow-lines" viewBox="0 0 1200 620" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <defs>
      <marker id="ops-arrow-green" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="8" refX="9" refY="4" orient="auto">
        <path d="M0,0 L10,4 L0,8 Z" fill="#2f7d32"></path>
      </marker>
      <marker id="ops-arrow-blue" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="8" refX="9" refY="4" orient="auto">
        <path d="M0,0 L10,4 L0,8 Z" fill="#2563eb"></path>
      </marker>
      <marker id="ops-arrow-purple" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="8" refX="9" refY="4" orient="auto">
        <path d="M0,0 L10,4 L0,8 Z" fill="#7c3fad"></path>
      </marker>
    </defs>
    <path d="M110 105 H195" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-blue)"></path>
    <path d="M280 105 H405" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-blue)"></path>
    <path d="M500 160 V238" stroke="#2f7d32" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-green)"></path>
    <path d="M685 150 V230" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="6 5" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-blue)"></path>
    <path d="M760 275 H835" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-blue)"></path>
    <path d="M535 384 V447" stroke="#2f7d32" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-green)"></path>
    <path d="M285 505 H385" stroke="#7c3fad" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-purple)"></path>
    <path d="M670 515 H830" stroke="#7c3fad" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="6 5" marker-end="url(#ops-arrow-purple)"></path>
  </svg>

  <div class="ops-entry">
    <button class="ops-diagram-node ops-icon-node" data-endpoint="/api/health" data-title="Public Ops API Health">
      <span class="ops-icon">◎</span>
      <strong>Internet</strong>
      <span class="ops-pill" id="map-api-status">checking</span>
      <span class="ops-subtle">80/443 public entry</span>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-diagram-node ops-icon-node" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="Dashboard Summary">
      <span class="ops-icon orange">▰</span>
      <strong>Home Router</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">port-forward to edge</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <section class="ops-plane edge-plane">
    <h3 class="ops-plane-title">Edge Plane</h3>
    <div class="ops-edge-content">
      <button class="ops-diagram-node edge" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="Edge Summary">
        <span class="ops-icon orange">▣</span>
        <strong>Mini PC / Edge Proxy</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">172.30.1.27</span>
        <div class="ops-node-meta">
          <code>/api/ops/summary</code>
        </div>
      </button>
      <div class="ops-edge-list">
        <div>• HTTPS reverse proxy</div>
        <div>• Kubernetes API HAProxy <strong>:6443</strong></div>
        <div>• Public API tunnel <strong>ops-api.mintcocoa.cc</strong></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ops-plane k8s-plane">
    <h3 class="ops-plane-title">Workload Entry + Kubernetes Ingress Rules</h3>
    <div class="ops-k8s-content">
      <button class="ops-diagram-node k8s" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/summary" data-title="Prometheus Summary">
        <span class="ops-icon green">◇</span>
        <strong>MetalLB VIP</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">172.30.1.240</span>
        <span class="ops-pill" id="map-prom-status">checking</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-diagram-node k8s" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/targets" data-title="Scrape Targets">
        <span class="ops-icon green">N</span>
        <strong>ingress-nginx</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">172.30.1.240:80/443</span>
        <div class="ops-node-meta">
          <code>/api/prometheus/targets</code>
        </div>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-diagram-node k8s" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_pod_info)" data-title="Pod Metric Query">
        <span class="ops-icon">K</span>
        <strong>Kubernetes Workloads</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">pods, deployments, PVC metric series</span>
        <div class="ops-node-meta">
          <code>/api/prometheus/query</code>
        </div>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="ops-ingress-grid">
      <button class="ops-mini-card" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_pod_info)" data-title="Portfolio Docs">
        <strong>mint-cocoa.github.io/portfolio</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">GitHub Pages canonical docs</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_pod_info)" data-title="Demo Pods">
        <strong>demo.mintcocoa.cc</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">service/demo-whoami → pod/demo-whoami</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_deployment_status_replicas_available)" data-title="Grafana Deployment">
        <strong>grafana.homelab.local</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">service/grafana → pod/grafana</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_deployment_status_replicas_available)" data-title="Argo CD Deployment">
        <strong>argocd.homelab.local</strong>
        <span class="ops-subtle">service/argocd-server → pod/argocd-server</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ops-plane api-plane">
    <button class="ops-diagram-node proxmox" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/nodes" data-title="Kubernetes API and Proxmox Node">
      <span class="ops-icon">K</span>
      <strong>Kubernetes API</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">172.30.1.27:6443</span>
      <div class="ops-api-list">
        <div><span>k8s-cp-1</span><strong>172.30.1.231:6443</strong></div>
        <div><span>k8s-cp-2</span><strong>172.30.1.232:6443</strong></div>
        <div><span>k8s-cp-3</span><strong>172.30.1.233:6443</strong></div>
      </div>
    </button>
  </section>

  <section class="ops-plane proxmox-plane">
    <h3 class="ops-plane-title">Proxmox VE 172.30.1.12</h3>
    <div class="ops-node-meta" style="justify-content:center; margin-bottom:0.55rem;">
      <span class="ops-pill" id="map-pve-status">checking</span>
      <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm</code>
    </div>
    <div class="ops-vm-list">
      <button class="ops-mini-card ops-vm-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="k8s-cp-1 VM" data-vmname="k8s-cp-1">
        <span class="ops-vm-badge">VM</span><span><span class="ops-node-name">k8s-cp-1</span><br><span class="ops-node-address">172.30.1.231</span></span><span>control-plane / etcd</span><span class="ops-pill" id="vm-status-k8s-cp-1">—</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card ops-vm-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="k8s-cp-2 VM" data-vmname="k8s-cp-2">
        <span class="ops-vm-badge">VM</span><span><span class="ops-node-name">k8s-cp-2</span><br><span class="ops-node-address">172.30.1.232</span></span><span>control-plane / etcd</span><span class="ops-pill" id="vm-status-k8s-cp-2">—</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card ops-vm-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="k8s-cp-3 VM" data-vmname="k8s-cp-3">
        <span class="ops-vm-badge">VM</span><span><span class="ops-node-name">k8s-cp-3</span><br><span class="ops-node-address">172.30.1.233</span></span><span>control-plane / etcd</span><span class="ops-pill" id="vm-status-k8s-cp-3">—</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card ops-vm-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="k8s-worker-1 VM" data-vmname="k8s-worker-1">
        <span class="ops-vm-badge green">VM</span><span><span class="ops-node-name">k8s-worker-1</span><br><span class="ops-node-address green">172.30.1.234</span></span><span>workloads</span><span class="ops-pill" id="vm-status-k8s-worker-1">—</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card ops-vm-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="k8s-worker-2 VM" data-vmname="k8s-worker-2">
        <span class="ops-vm-badge green">VM</span><span><span class="ops-node-name">k8s-worker-2</span><br><span class="ops-node-address green">172.30.1.235</span></span><span>workloads</span><span class="ops-pill" id="vm-status-k8s-worker-2">—</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mini-card ops-vm-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="OMV NAS Storage" data-vmname="omv">
        <span class="ops-vm-badge purple">VM</span><span><span class="ops-node-name">OMV / NAS VM</span><br><span class="ops-node-address purple">172.30.1.52</span></span><span>NFS storage</span><span class="ops-pill" id="vm-status-omv">—</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ops-plane management-plane">
    <h3 class="ops-plane-title">Management Plane (Out-of-Cluster)</h3>
    <div class="ops-mgmt-node-header">
      <span class="ops-icon purple" style="width:1.8rem;height:1.8rem;font-size:1rem;">O</span>
      <span><strong>Odroid Management Node</strong><br><span class="ops-node-address purple">172.30.1.83</span></span>
    </div>
    <div class="ops-mgmt-tools">
      <button class="ops-mgmt-tool-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/version" data-title="Proxmox Version">
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-icon" style="background:#ffeedd;color:#c47b20;">Tf</span>
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-label">Terraform <span class="ops-subtle">→</span> Proxmox API<br><code>172.30.1.12:8006</code></span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mgmt-tool-row" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="Kubernetes VMs">
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-icon" style="background:#e8f0ff;color:#2563eb;">A</span>
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-label">Ansible / Kubespray <span class="ops-subtle">→</span> K8s VMs<br><code>cluster provision</code></span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mgmt-tool-row" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/summary" data-title="Kubectl Helm Access">
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-icon" style="background:#e8f6ef;color:#16815b;">K</span>
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-label">kubectl / Helm <span class="ops-subtle">→</span> K8s API<br><code>172.30.1.27:6443</code></span>
      </button>
      <button class="ops-mgmt-tool-row" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_deployment_status_replicas_available)" data-title="Argo CD Bootstrap">
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-icon" style="background:#f1e9ff;color:#7c3fad;">Ar</span>
        <span class="ops-mgmt-tool-label">Argo CD bootstrap <span class="ops-subtle">→</span> K8s API<br><code>GitOps init</code></span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ops-plane storage-plane">
    <h3 class="ops-plane-title">Storage Path</h3>
    <div class="ops-bottom-path">
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase)" data-title="PVC Metrics"><strong>Pod</strong><span>PVC request</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase)" data-title="PVC Phases"><strong>PVC</strong><span>claim</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="StorageClass nfs-client"><strong>StorageClass</strong><span style="font-size:0.72rem;line-height:1.3;">nfs-subdir-<br>external-<br>provisioner</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="NFS Provisioner"><strong>nfs-client</strong><span>dynamic PV</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="OMV NAS Storage"><strong>OMV / NAS VM</strong><span>172.30.1.52<br>/export/k8s_pv</span></button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ops-plane gitops-plane">
    <h3 class="ops-plane-title">GitOps Deployment Path</h3>
    <div class="ops-bottom-path">
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="Developer to Summary"><strong>Developer PC</strong><span>git push</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="GitHub Repository"><strong>GitHub</strong><span>Repository</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="GitHub Actions CI"><strong>Actions</strong><span>CI build</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="GHCR Container Image"><strong>GHCR</strong><span>Container Image</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="GitOps Repository"><strong>GitOps Repo</strong><span class="ops-subtle" style="font-size:0.72rem;">home-k8s-gitops</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_deployment_status_replicas_available)" data-title="Argo CD Sync"><strong>Argo CD</strong><span>sync</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/summary" data-title="Kubernetes Deployment"><strong>Kubernetes</strong><span>Cluster</span></button>
      <button class="ops-path-item" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/targets" data-title="Ingress Targets"><strong>Ingress</strong><span>nginx + MetalLB</span></button>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ops-legend" aria-label="Flow legend">
  <span class="ops-legend-item"><span class="ops-legend-line green"></span>User Traffic (HTTP/HTTPS)</span>
  <span class="ops-legend-item"><span class="ops-legend-line blue"></span>Kubernetes API Traffic</span>
  <span class="ops-legend-item"><span class="ops-legend-line purple dashed"></span>Management / GitOps / Storage</span>
  <span class="ops-legend-item"><span class="ops-legend-line blue dashed"></span>Control / Provisioning Flow</span>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.card title="Live API Explorer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ops-response-header">
  <div>
    <p class="ops-kicker">Selected endpoint</p>
    <strong id="selected-title">Ops Summary</strong>
    <div class="ops-subtle" id="selected-endpoint">/api/ops/summary</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ops-response-actions">
    <button class="ops-action-button" id="run-endpoint-button" type="button">Run</button>
    <a class="ops-action-button" id="open-endpoint-link" href="https://ops-api.mintcocoa.cc/api/ops/summary" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open</a>
  </div>
</div>

<pre class="ops-code" id="endpoint-output">Loading</pre>
```
:::

## Row {height="22%"}

::: {.card title="Live Health"}
```{=html}
<p>
  <span class="ops-status">
    <span class="ops-dot" id="health-dot"></span>
    <span id="health-text">Checking</span>
  </span>
</p>
```

| Check | Status |
|---|---|
| Prometheus | <span id="health-prometheus">Loading</span> |
| Proxmox | <span id="health-proxmox">Loading</span> |
| Auth mode | <span id="health-auth">Loading</span> |
| Updated | <span id="updated-at">Loading</span> |
:::

::: {.card title="Endpoint Catalog"}
```{=html}
<div class="ops-endpoint-grid" id="endpoint-catalog">
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/health" data-title="Health">
    <strong>Health</strong>
    <code>/api/health</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="Ops Summary">
    <strong>Unified Summary</strong>
    <code>/api/ops/summary</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=up" data-title="PromQL Query">
    <strong>PromQL Query</strong>
    <code>/api/prometheus/query?query=up</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/targets" data-title="Prometheus Targets">
    <strong>Prometheus Targets</strong>
    <code>/api/prometheus/targets</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/summary" data-title="Prometheus Summary">
    <strong>Prometheus Summary</strong>
    <code>/api/prometheus/summary</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/version" data-title="Proxmox Version">
    <strong>Proxmox Version</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/version</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources" data-title="All Proxmox Resources">
    <strong>All Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="Proxmox VM Resources">
    <strong>VM Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=node" data-title="Proxmox Node Resources">
    <strong>Node Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=node</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="Proxmox Storage Resources">
    <strong>Storage Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=pool" data-title="Proxmox Pool Resources">
    <strong>Pool Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=pool</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=sdn" data-title="Proxmox SDN Resources">
    <strong>SDN Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=sdn</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/nodes" data-title="Proxmox Nodes">
    <strong>Nodes</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/nodes</code>
  </button>
</div>
```
:::

## Row {height="33%"}

::: {.card title="Proxmox VM Inventory"}
```{=html}
<table class="ops-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>VMID</th>
      <th>Name</th>
      <th>Status</th>
      <th>vCPU</th>
      <th>Memory</th>
      <th>Uptime</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="vm-table-body">
    <tr><td colspan="6">Loading</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```
:::

::: {.card title="Metric Series Snapshot"}
```{=html}
<table class="ops-table">
  <thead class="sr-only">
    <tr>
      <th>Metric</th>
      <th>Value</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><th>Deployments</th><td id="deployments-value">Loading</td></tr>
    <tr><th>PVC phases</th><td id="pvc-value">Loading</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Container CPU series</th><td id="container-series-value">Loading</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Prometheus up series</th><td id="up-series-value">Loading</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```
:::

```{=html}
<script>
const OPS_API_BASE = "https://ops-api.mintcocoa.cc";
let selectedEndpoint = "/api/ops/summary";
let selectedTitle = "Ops Summary";

const setText = (id, value) => {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  if (element) element.textContent = value;
};

const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value ?? "")
  .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
  .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
  .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
  .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
  .replaceAll("'", "&#039;");

const statusPill = (value) => {
  const safe = String(value ?? "unknown").toLowerCase();
  return `<span class="ops-pill ${escapeHtml(safe)}">${escapeHtml(value ?? "unknown")}</span>`;
};

const formatNumber = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || Number.isNaN(Number(value))) return "-";
  return Number(value).toLocaleString("en-US", { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
};

const formatBytes = (value) => {
  const bytes = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(bytes) || bytes <= 0) return "-";
  const units = ["B", "KiB", "MiB", "GiB", "TiB"];
  let size = bytes;
  let index = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && index < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    index += 1;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(index === 0 ? 0 : 1)} ${units[index]}`;
};

const formatDuration = (seconds) => {
  const total = Number(seconds);
  if (!Number.isFinite(total) || total <= 0) return "-";
  const days = Math.floor(total / 86400);
  const hours = Math.floor((total % 86400) / 3600);
  if (days > 0) return `${days}d ${hours}h`;
  return `${hours}h`;
};

const fetchJson = async (endpoint) => {
  const response = await fetch(`${OPS_API_BASE}${endpoint}`, { cache: "no-store" });
  const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
  if (!response.ok) {
    const message = payload.detail ?? `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
    throw new Error(typeof message === "string" ? message : JSON.stringify(message));
  }
  return payload;
};

const setMapStatus = (id, value) => {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!element) return;
  const safe = String(value ?? "unknown").toLowerCase();
  element.className = `ops-pill ${safe}`;
  element.textContent = value ?? "unknown";
};

const updateSelectedEndpoint = (endpoint, title, run = true) => {
  selectedEndpoint = endpoint;
  selectedTitle = title;
  setText("selected-title", title);
  setText("selected-endpoint", endpoint);

  const link = document.getElementById("open-endpoint-link");
  if (link) link.href = `${OPS_API_BASE}${endpoint}`;

  document.querySelectorAll("[data-endpoint]").forEach((element) => {
    element.classList.toggle("active", element.dataset.endpoint === endpoint);
  });

  if (run) runSelectedEndpoint();
};

const runSelectedEndpoint = async () => {
  const output = document.getElementById("endpoint-output");
  if (output) output.textContent = `GET ${selectedEndpoint}\nLoading`;

  try {
    const payload = await fetchJson(selectedEndpoint);
    if (output) output.textContent = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
  } catch (error) {
    if (output) output.textContent = `GET ${selectedEndpoint}\nError: ${error.message}`;
  }
};

const loadDashboard = async () => {
  const health = await fetchJson("/api/health");
  const summary = await fetchJson("/api/ops/summary");

  const prom = summary.prometheus?.data;
  const node = summary.proxmoxNodes?.data?.nodes?.[0];
  const vms = summary.proxmoxVMs?.data?.resources ?? [];
  const runningVms = vms.filter((vm) => vm.status === "running").length;

  const healthDot = document.getElementById("health-dot");
  if (healthDot) healthDot.className = `ops-dot ${health.ok ? "ok" : "fail"}`;
  setText("health-text", health.ok ? "Ops API healthy" : "Ops API degraded");
  setText("health-prometheus", health.prometheus);
  setText("health-proxmox", health.proxmox);
  setText("health-auth", health.proxmoxAuthMode);
  setMapStatus("map-api-status", health.ok ? "up" : "down");
  setMapStatus("map-prom-status", health.prometheus === "ok" ? "up" : "down");
  setMapStatus("map-pve-status", health.proxmox === "ok" ? "up" : "down");

  setText("targets-value", `${prom?.targets?.up ?? "-"} / ${prom?.targets?.total ?? "-"}`);
  setText("targets-detail", `${prom?.targets?.down ?? "-"} down targets`);
  setText("pods-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.pods));
  setText("pods-detail", `${formatNumber(prom?.series?.deployments)} deployments observed`);
  setText("node-value", node?.node ?? "-");
  setText("node-detail", `${node?.status ?? "unknown"} · ${formatBytes(node?.mem)} / ${formatBytes(node?.maxmem)}`);
  setText("vm-value", `${runningVms} / ${vms.length}`);
  setText("vm-detail", "running / total qemu resources");

  // Update per-VM status badges in the architecture diagram
  const vmNames = ["k8s-cp-1", "k8s-cp-2", "k8s-cp-3", "k8s-worker-1", "k8s-worker-2"];
  for (const name of vmNames) {
    const vm = vms.find((v) => v.name === name);
    const badge = document.getElementById(`vm-status-${name}`);
    if (badge && vm) {
      const status = vm.status ?? "unknown";
      badge.className = `ops-pill ${status === "running" ? "running" : "stopped"}`;
      badge.textContent = status;
    }
  }
  // OMV NAS badge — check storage resources for 172.30.1.52
  const storageResources = summary.proxmoxStorage?.data?.resources ?? [];
  const omvBadge = document.getElementById("vm-status-omv");
  if (omvBadge) {
    const omvUp = storageResources.length > 0;
    omvBadge.className = `ops-pill ${omvUp ? "running" : "stopped"}`;
    omvBadge.textContent = omvUp ? "online" : "unknown";
  }

  setText("deployments-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.deployments));
  setText("pvc-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.pvcPhases));
  setText("container-series-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.containerCpuSeries));
  setText("up-series-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.up));
  setText("updated-at", new Date((summary.generatedAt ?? Date.now() / 1000) * 1000).toLocaleString());

  const body = document.getElementById("vm-table-body");
  if (body) {
    body.innerHTML = vms
      .slice()
      .sort((a, b) => Number(a.vmid ?? 0) - Number(b.vmid ?? 0))
      .map((vm) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${escapeHtml(vm.vmid ?? "-")}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(vm.name ?? vm.id ?? "-")}</td>
          <td>${statusPill(vm.status)}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(vm.maxcpu ?? "-")}</td>
          <td>${formatBytes(vm.mem)} / ${formatBytes(vm.maxmem)}</td>
          <td>${formatDuration(vm.uptime)}</td>
        </tr>
      `)
      .join("");
  }
};

loadDashboard().catch((error) => {
  const healthDot = document.getElementById("health-dot");
  if (healthDot) healthDot.className = "ops-dot fail";
  setMapStatus("map-api-status", "down");
  setMapStatus("map-prom-status", "error");
  setMapStatus("map-pve-status", "error");
  setText("health-text", "Ops API fetch failed");
  setText("targets-value", "Error");
  setText("targets-detail", error.message);
  setText("updated-at", new Date().toLocaleString());
});

document.querySelectorAll("[data-endpoint]").forEach((element) => {
  element.addEventListener("click", () => {
    updateSelectedEndpoint(
      element.dataset.endpoint,
      element.dataset.title ?? element.dataset.endpoint,
    );
  });
});

document.getElementById("run-endpoint-button")?.addEventListener("click", runSelectedEndpoint);
updateSelectedEndpoint(selectedEndpoint, selectedTitle, false);
runSelectedEndpoint();
</script>
```
